evidence: frontend/src/hooks/useSessionCompletionRoute.ts — reads ?session= via SESSION_SEARCH_PARAM; isVisible when enrollments.find(currentSessionId === sessionId) and !loading
frontend/src/components/paths/SessionCompletionRoute.tsx — outer data-bubble-id bTJAG, inner bTJAB; renders DS-04 SessionCompletionForm with session from fetchPathSession(sessionId, pathSlug)
frontend/src/lib/paths/pathsSessionApi.ts — fetchPathSession queries pathsession/pathquestion tables with catalog fallback
frontend/src/lib/paths/pathsEnrollmentStore.ts — enrollments back bTItY RG current_session matching
frontend/src/pages/Paths.tsx — sessionCompletionVisible ? SessionCompletionRoute : bTJDf (PATHS_CONTENT_BUBBLE_ID) shell; EnrollmentFloatingBar hidden when overlay active
frontend/src/components/design-system/SessionCompletionForm.tsx — bTIxC title_text and bTIxG coaching_text_text bindings from pathsession prop (DS-04 reused verbatim)
frontend/src/components/paths/SessionCompletionRoute.tsx — bTIzk submit via handleSubmit → schedulePathSessionCompletion; clearSessionParam(); onReturnToMyPaths() (selectMyPaths)
frontend/src/lib/paths/pathsSessionApi.ts — schedulePathSessionCompletion bTJCM ScheduleAPIEvent stub (console.info handler tag)
frontend/src/components/design-system/SessionCompletionForm.tsx — bTJBC/bTJBI plugin placeholders hidden aria-hidden inert

functional_audit.check: ?session= URL param matching an enrollment currentSessionId shows SessionCompletionForm with resolved pathsession data
Missing or non-matching session param keeps bTJDf paths grid/header/tabs visible and hides completion overlay
Submit clears session search param (replace navigation) and returns user to My Paths tab/grid
EnrollmentFloatingBar suppressed while session-completion overlay is active
Brownfield preflight documented gap-fill with existing prototype reuse (DS-04, paths store, PATHS-01 gating)

ui_evidence.notes: Outer CustomElement mount wrapper inside ai_RNbBHYGq; Bubble pointer /pages/bTHDg/elements/bTJDe/elements/bTJAG
Inner mount hosts DS-04 SessionCompletionForm when session data resolves
RE session completion form root on SessionCompletionForm; title/coaching/question regions preserved
Enrollment RG marker on EnrollmentFloatingBar/PathsGridPanel; URL match uses pathsEnrollmentStore currentSessionId not DOM
PATHS_CONTENT_BUBBLE_ID shell hidden via conditional render when sessionCompletionVisible

critiques.finding: When ?session= matches an enrollment but fetchPathSession returns null (unknown id or fetch error), bTJAG/bTJAB mount renders with no form body and no user-facing error after loading completes.
critiques.alternative: Show an inline error or redirect to My Paths with toast when session data cannot be resolved; avoid leaving an empty overlay shell.

critiques.finding: schedulePathSessionCompletion is intentionally a no-op beyond console.info until API-06 paths-progress trigger lands; answers/reflection state are not persisted on submit.
critiques.alternative: Wire edge-function or client patch in API-06 post-completion item; optionally queue pathanswer writes when pathanswer table exists.

critiques.finding: No automated integration test exercises bTJDf hide/show toggle or ?session= gating end-to-end; PATHS-01 review deferred this to PATHS-07.
critiques.alternative: Add a React Router test rendering Paths with search params and mocked pathsEnrollmentStore asserting bTJDf vs bTJAB visibility and post-submit param clear.

critiques.finding: Duplicate data-bubble-id='bTItY' on EnrollmentFloatingBar and PathsGridPanel persists from PATHS-02/06; PATHS-07 matching logic is store-driven so parity is unaffected.
critiques.alternative: Retain single canonical bTItY marker on EnrollmentFloatingBar per PATHS-06 critique C-1 when polishing IR hierarchy.
